# === canonical (hand-written; preserved by generator) ===
#
# Rule: password
# Category: technology
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Emits a fixed 8-rune mask regardless of source length so password
# length is not leaked; empty input returns empty. Example: MyP@ssw0rd!
# → ********.

MyP@ssw0rd!	********

# === generated (do not edit; regenerated by make corpus-regen) ===
